Maintain.reviewTrigger: The owned behavior, boundary, workflow, or repository structure changes.
Maintain.reclamationAction: Merge duplicate guidance into its owner; keep the mapped file only while its owner role remains distinct.

Public workflow.reviewTrigger: Repository URL, reporting path, public policy, contribution flow, or release support changes.
Public workflow.minimumCheckFrequency: Same change and before every public release.
Public workflow.reclamationAction: Repair stale public links immediately; remove obsolete intake paths instead of leaving redirects in prose.

Historical.reviewTrigger: An active owner cites it or a rationale audit is requested.
Historical.reclamationAction: Move any still-normative rule to an owner, then archive or remove the artifact when it no longer provides linked rationale.

Prototype evidence.reviewTrigger: Accepted UI behavior or visual evidence changes.
Prototype evidence.reclamationAction: Promote accepted behavior to docs/UI_PROTOTYPE.md; archive superseded screenshots and indexes when no active contract links them.

Phase-gated resource.reviewTrigger: The owning implementation phase starts or completes.
Phase-gated resource.minimumCheckFrequency: At both phase boundaries, plus quarterly inventory.
Phase-gated resource.reclamationAction: Add reviewed resources, explicitly retain the empty placeholder with a current reason, or remove it.
